flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at South Suburban College fell 34% between 2006 and 2009 (19.1% → 12.5%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at South Suburban College rose 92% between 2021 and 2024 (32.8% → 62.9%).
